dkr_p_v2_boundary: A new calibration and row-selection DKR is funded; measurement implementation, CKR performance advance, and optimization remain blocked.
commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only contribution review; write only workers/challenger-release-tree/review.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
